docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-13-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 504

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2022 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY DOES NOT OWE MARYNA CHERNIY ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT FILED MAY-11-2022. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2022 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT BERDICHEVSKY, MIKHAIL TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT CHERNIY, MARYNA NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MARYNA CHERNIY IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATIANA IACONA. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT BERDICHEVSKY, MIKHAIL MAILED TO RESPONDENT CHERNIY, MARYNA
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUL-13-2022 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,759.20 FILED BY CHERNIY, MARYNA AS TO DEFENDANT BERDICHEVSKY, MIKHAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHERNIY, MARYNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERDICHEVSKY, MIKHAIL $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,375.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT BERDICHEVSKY, MIKHAIL
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2022 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON JUL-13-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 504, JUDGE GARRETT WONG. (206)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Set For Trial On Jul-13-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: All parties are sworn.

Appearances:
Maryna Cherniy Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per.
Mikhail Berdichevsky Defendant/Appellant in pro per.
Russian Interpreter, Tatiana Iacona #700132 is present.
Ms. Iacona has an oath on file.

Maryna Cherniy plaintiff/respondent testifies on her own behalf with the assistance of Ms. Iacona.

Mikhail Berdichevsky defendant/appellant testifies on his own behalf.
Mr. Berdichevsky presents the following exhibit:

Exh. 1: Letter from Janice Wang D.D.

The Court does not believe that there was a breach in the standard of care. The Court reverses the decision made by the Small Claims court filed on May 11, 2022.

All exhibits are returned to the offering parties. Mr. Berdichevsky accepts his exhibit.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Continued To Jul-13-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Judgment Entered
